articles.title: Repeat winners Sharon Lokedi, John Korir proved Boston Marathon favorites in more ways than one
articles.description:
Upon hearing his news, she clapped her hands, patted her countryman on the shoulders, and said, “Good job! Good job!”

The post Repeat winners Sharon Lokedi, John Korir proved Boston Marathon favorites in more ways than one appeared first on Boston.com.
